import pytest
from source import gcd

def test_gcd_returns_correct_value_for_non_trivial_pair():
    """
    This test will fail on the buggy implementation of gcd which
    recurses indefinitely (or raises RecursionError) when called with
    a pair where a > b and a % b != 0.  The fixed implementation
    correctly returns the greatest common divisor.
    """
    assert gcd(35, 21) == 7, "gcd(35, 21) should return 7"
